items.title: # Draft New Letter
items.content: Write a cover letter for the [Job Title] position at [Company Name]. My resume is: [Paste Resume Text]. The job description is: [Paste Job Description Text].

items.title: # Tailor Existing Letter
items.content: Refine this cover letter for the [New Job Title] at [New Company Name]. Focus on these requirements: [List key requirements]. Here is the original letter: [Paste Original Letter Text].

items.title: # Emphasize Key Skills
items.content: Generate a cover letter for [Job Title] at [Company Name]. Highlight my [Skill 1], [Skill 2], and [Skill 3] from my resume: [Paste Relevant Resume Section]. Job description: [Paste Job Description].

items.title: # Address Career Gap
items.content: Draft a cover letter for a [Job Title] role, explaining a [Reason for gap, e.g., career break, career change]. Emphasize my [Relevant past experience] and future goals. Job description: [Paste Job

items.title: # Enhance My Resume
items.content: Rewrite my resume for a [Job Title] role. Focus on [Key Skills] and quantify achievements. My current resume: [Paste Resume Here]

items.title: # Tailor Cover Letter
items.content: Draft a cover letter for the [Job Title] position at [Company Name]. Highlight my experience in [Relevant Experience] and explain why I'm a good fit. My resume: [Paste Resume]

items.title: # Optimize Bullet Points
items.content: Improve these resume bullet points to be more action-oriented and results-driven for a [Industry] role: [List Bullet Points]. Make them concise and impactful.

items.title: # Identify Skill Gaps
items.content: Analyze this [Job Description] and my resume: [Paste Resume]. Identify any missing key skills or experiences I should consider developing or highlighting.

items.title: # Tutorial Script Outline
items.content: Create a YouTube script for a tutorial on [Topic]. Include an intro, 3 main steps, and a conclusion. Target [Audience] and keep it under [Duration] minutes.

items.title: # Product Review Script
items.content: Write a YouTube script for a review of [Product Name]. Highlight its [Key Feature 1] and [Key Feature 2]. Include pros, cons, and a final recommendation for [Audience].

items.title: # Engaging Story Script
items.content: Generate a YouTube script for a storytelling video about [Personal Experience/Topic]. Structure it with a hook, rising action, climax, and resolution. Aim for an emotional connection with [Audience].

items.title: # Explainer Video Script
items.content: Draft a YouTube script explaining [Complex Concept] simply. Break it down into 3-4 easy-to-understand sections. Use analogies if possible. Target a beginner [Audience] in [Tone].

items.title: # Outline Blog Post
items.content: Create a blog post outline for an article about [Topic] for [Audience]. Include an intro, 3 main sections with sub-points, and a conclusion. Suggest a catchy title.

items.title: # Draft Blog Content
items.content: Write a 500-word blog post about [Topic] for [Audience]. Use a [Tone] tone. Include a clear call to action at the end, encouraging readers to [Action].

items.title: # Generate Blog Ideas
items.content: Generate 10 blog post ideas for a blog focused on [Niche] and targeting [Audience]. Ensure the ideas are engaging and cover various aspects of the topic.

items.title: # Craft Blog Intro
items.content: Write a compelling blog post introduction and 5 headline options for an article about [Topic] for [Audience]. The intro should hook readers and state the article's value.

items.title: # Craft Engaging Captions
items.content: Write an Instagram caption for a post about [Topic]. Make it [Tone] and include a call to action asking [Call to Action]. Target [Audience].

items.title: # Promote Product Easily
items.content: Create an Instagram caption to promote [Product/Service]. Highlight [Benefit 1] and [Benefit 2]. Use an encouraging tone and ask users to [Call to Action].

items.title: # Share Personal Stories
items.content: Generate an Instagram caption telling a short story about [Experience/Event]. Focus on [Key Emotion]. End with a question to engage followers.

items.title: # Educate Your Audience
items.content: Draft an informative Instagram caption explaining [Concept/Tip] in simple terms. Include 3 key takeaways. Encourage discussion in the comments.

items.title: # Craft Engaging Captions
items.content: Write an Instagram caption for a photo of [Photo Description]. Make it [Tone] and include a call to action to [Call to Action]. Keep it under 2200 characters.

items.title: # Launch Product Buzz
items.content: Generate an Instagram caption announcing the launch of [Product Name]. Highlight [Key Benefit 1] and [Key Benefit 2]. Encourage users to [Call to Action]. Use emojis.

items.title: # Promote Event Hype
items.content: Create an Instagram caption to promote [Event Name] on [Date] at [Location]. Describe why people should attend. Include relevant hashtags and a link to [Registration Link].

items.title: # Share Personal Story
items.content: Write an Instagram caption sharing a brief personal story about [Topic/Experience]. Focus on [Emotion/Lesson Learned]. Ask a question to encourage engagement in the comments.

items.title: # Plan Daily Itinerary
items.content: Create a 3-day itinerary for [City] for [Number] people, focused on [Interests]. Include [Number] activities/day, meal suggestions, and travel times. Output as a bulleted list.

items.title: # Generate Packing List
items.content: Generate a packing list for a [Number]-day trip to [Destination] in [Month/Season]. Consider [Activities] and weather. Categorize items.

items.title: # Estimate Trip Costs
items.content: Estimate a budget for a [Number]-day trip to [Destination] for [Number] adults. Include flights, accommodation, food, activities, and transport. Provide low/mid/high ranges.
